name: Abercrombie & Fitch Co.
description: Abercrombie & Fitch Co. is a leading global, multi-brand specialty retailer of apparel and accessories for men, women and kids through five renowned brands: Abercrombie & Fitch, abercrombie kids, Hollister, Gilly Hicks, and Social Tourist. The company operates primarily in North America, Europe, and Asia, offering high-quality, comfortable, and stylish products designed to inspire customers to feel confident and comfortable in their own skin. Founded in 1892, the company is headquartered in New Albany, Ohio.
